$comment: All narrative text. Word budget ~1,200 at MVP; max two lines on screen. Proper nouns never explained. See design doc §6 for voice rules.

waystones.sunfield-meadow: Walk gently. The meadow fed them, too, and they are under it.
waystones.bramble-hedgerows: The stone does not grow back. Take it like you mean it.
waystones.old-growth-wood: These roots drink deeper than you will ever dig. Let them.

verses.sunfield-meadow: What you carry is borrowed. Set some down, and see what follows you home.

provisioner.line: Sell me nothing you would weep to lose. I do not give refunds, and the land does not either.
The last warden asked fewer questions. Hm. Perhaps that was the trouble.

migrationVignette: The camp folds. The land exhales.

fossilCards.antler-crown: A crown of bone for a king of no kingdom. The meadow remembers being afraid, and will not say of what.
